title: Beta CritSound
description: Replaces the critical hit sound with a custom one. Lightweight, no textures, just audio.
body:
# Beta CritsSound

Beta CritsSound is a lightweight PvP resource pack that replaces the default Minecraft critical hit sound with a cleaner and more satisfying custom one.

The goal of this pack is to improve combat feedback while still keeping the vanilla Minecraft feeling. No unnecessary textures, no visual clutter — just a simple and clean crit sound replacement designed for everyday gameplay and PvP.

# Resource Pack Sound:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/dXpq6RGlTyA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Features
- Custom critical hit sound
- Lightweight and simple
- Vanilla-friendly
- PvP focused
- Easy drag & drop installation

# Installation
- Download the pack
- Move the ZIP file into your resourcepacks folder
- Enable the pack in Minecraft
- Enjoy the new crit sound

# Notes

This pack only changes the critical hit sound effect and does not modify gameplay.
You can change the sound to whatever you like.
